blended.narrative: Norquay is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
